# Copilot Instructions

- Keep changes minimal and focused on the TailCheck monorepo.
- Favor TypeScript, pnpm workspaces, and Turbo task orchestration.
- Keep backend code compile-safe without requiring live API keys.
- Keep frontend UI polished, dark-console inspired, and consistent with Tailwind and shadcn/ui patterns.
- Use shared Zod schemas for runtime validation and shared types for API contracts.
